rationale.P01: Real NodeNotReady SEV1: node ip-10-0-7-44 dropped node_ready 1->0 at 22:40 and stayed 0 through 23:00, pat-node-notready surging +700% negative, never auto-resolved. Genuine capacity loss. Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P02: DisruptionBlocked, PDB protecting streaming taskmanagers. pat-pdb-block delta 0%, neutral, recurring 6x/hr. Normal Karpenter/PDB operational meta-event. Suppress.
rationale.P03: DisruptionBlocked, same pat-pdb-block (delta 0%, neutral, 6x/hr). Operational meta-event. Suppress.
rationale.P04: Unconsolidatable NodePool nodepool-olapdb, pat-unconsolidatable delta 0% neutral. Expected Karpenter config event. Suppress.
rationale.P05: SpotToSpotConsolidation disabled, pat-spot-consol delta 0% neutral. Normal NodePool config. Suppress.
rationale.P06: store validated, pat-store-validated delta 0% neutral. Routine validation event. Suppress.
rationale.P07: DisruptionBlocked, pat-pdb-block delta 0% neutral. Operational meta-event. Suppress.
rationale.P08: Unconsolidatable, pat-unconsolidatable delta 0% neutral. Expected Karpenter event. Suppress.
rationale.P09: SpotToSpotConsolidation disabled, pat-spot-consol delta 0% neutral. NodePool config. Suppress.
rationale.P10: store validated, pat-store-validated delta 0% neutral. Routine. Suppress.
rationale.P11: DisruptionBlocked, pat-pdb-block delta 0% neutral. Operational meta-event. Suppress.
rationale.P12: Unconsolidatable, pat-unconsolidatable delta 0% neutral. Expected Karpenter event. Suppress.
rationale.P13: [ignore] Default Log Threshold Monitor: 17 fires/hr, auto_resolved_after_s 20, pat-log-threshold delta 0%. Chronic flapper. Suppress.
rationale.P14: SpotToSpotConsolidation disabled, pat-spot-consol delta 0% neutral. NodePool config. Suppress.
rationale.P15: store validated, pat-store-validated delta 0% neutral. Routine. Suppress.
rationale.P16: DisruptionBlocked, pat-pdb-block delta 0% neutral. Operational meta-event. Suppress.
rationale.P17: [ignore] Default Log Threshold Monitor: 19 fires/hr, auto_resolved_after_s 18, delta 0%. Flapper. Suppress.
rationale.P18: scheduling_pending_pods=7 on olapdb-server at 22:43, related_pattern pat-node-notready, onset minutes after P01. Downstream symptom of the NodeNotReady capacity loss. Collapse into P01. Suppress as duplicate.
rationale.P19: Real CrashLoopBackOff on checkout-api: value 11 restarts vs threshold 3, pat-checkout-crashloop +1400% negative (nil-pointer panic in PaymentHandler), onset 21:54 right after deploy checkout-api@2026.06.19-4 at 21:52, never auto-resolves. available_replicas fell 3->1 (below min 3) and stayed at 1. Genuine deploy-induced outage. Page (representative root of the checkout incident).
rationale.P20: available_replicas=1 (below threshold 3) on checkout-api at 21:58, related_pattern pat-checkout-crashloop, same deploy and onset window as P19. Downstream symptom of the same crashloop. Collapse into P19. Suppress as duplicate.
rationale.P21: Real node MemoryPressure eviction SEV1: ip-10-0-9-21 node_memory_available_pct fell 18->3 at 22:05 and stayed ~4, evicting ingest-gateway pods, pat-mempressure-evict +900% negative, never auto-resolves. Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P22: http_5xx_rate 38.4 (threshold 2) on ingest-gateway at 22:08, related_pattern pat-mempressure-evict, onset minutes after P21. Customer-facing symptom of the memory-pressure eviction. Collapse into P21. Suppress as duplicate.
rationale.P23: billing-worker pod_crashloop: looks severe (SEV3 crashloop after deploy billing-worker@2026.06.19-2) but it is a flapper: fired_count_last_1h 14, auto_resolved_after_s 35, pat-billing-restart delta 0% neutral, available_replicas recovered 4->5 immediately and held. Self-healing readiness-probe restarts, not an outage. Suppress (precision trap).

notes: Three real page-class incidents: P01 (NodeNotReady capacity loss, SEV1, must_page) with symptom P18; P19 (checkout-api CrashLoopBackOff below min replicas, deploy-induced) with symptom P20; P21 (node memory-pressure eviction causing customer 5xx, SEV1, must_page) with symptom P22. must_page = the two SEV1 incidents. Noise: Karpenter/PDB/store-validated operational meta-events (P02-P12,P14-P16), [ignore] log flappers (P13,P17), and the P23 billing-worker crashloop flapper (precision trap: deploy-correlated and crashloop-shaped but auto-resolves in 35s with delta 0% and replicas recovered).
